articles.title: 2 Boston men accused of assaulting man who hit their car while trying to park
articles.description:
The two suspects allegedly followed the man who hit their car, smashed his window, and viciously beat him, according to witnesses.

The post 2 Boston men accused of assaulting man who hit their car while trying to park appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two Boston men allegedly assaulted a man after he hit their car while parking.
Witnesses reported the suspects smashed the victim's window and beat him on March 25.
This incident raises concerns about road rage and public safety in Boston neighborhoods.

articles.title: 2026 Red Sox preview: 4 questions facing Alex Cora’s club
articles.description:
The Red Sox face questions about their lineup, bullpen, and more entering a promising new season.

The post 2026 Red Sox preview: 4 questions facing Alex Cora’s club appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox face lineup and bullpen questions as 2026 season approaches.
Manager Alex Cora must address team weaknesses before opening day on March 30.
Local fans hope for improved performance to boost attendance at Fenway Park.

articles.title: Healey announces kickoff of public safety initiative for 2026 World Cup
articles.description:
Thursday’s friendly match in Foxborough will act as a trial run for the state’s safety plan during the seven scheduled summer matches.

The post Healey announces kickoff of public safety initiative for 2026 World Cup appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Healey launches public safety initiative for 2026 World Cup in Boston.
Thursday's match in Foxborough will test safety measures for seven summer matches.
Residents can expect enhanced security protocols during the World Cup events.

articles.title: Kraft-owned New England Revolution backing White Stadium renovation
articles.description:
“The New England Revolution knows well the benefits that public-private stadium projects deliver to local communities."

The post Kraft-owned New England Revolution backing White Stadium renovation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New England Revolution supports renovation of White Stadium to enhance community facilities.
Kraft Group emphasizes public-private partnerships for local development and economic growth.
Renovation aims to improve sports access for Boston residents and boost local engagement.

articles.title: Maine man in critical condition after stopping to help stranded driver
articles.description:
The man may have attempted to shield the driver from an oncoming car, police said.

The post Maine man in critical condition after stopping to help stranded driver appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maine man critically injured while assisting a stranded driver on the highway.
Police report the man attempted to shield the driver from an oncoming vehicle.
Incident raises awareness about roadside safety for Boston area drivers.
